records.title: Paris Hotel Star Ratings Explained - Paris Discovery Guide
records.summary: Star ratings used by Paris, France hotels tell you a lot about what you'll get for your travel money. We explain what each star means so you can make a good ...

data_schema.patterns: Content is descriptive text explaining categories (1 to 5 stars, plus 4-star 'Palace' distinction). Data is unstructured within paragraphs, not in a tabular format.
data_schema.anomalies: No structured dataset or explicit data tables found in the provided content snippet. The page is an article, not a data listing. Sample values are inferred from the topic, not extracted from explicit fields.
data_schema.volume: Low. The page contains definitions for approximately 6 rating categories.

real_data_samples.description: Basic comfort with some additional amenities.
